reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the pickup idle flame and despawn the entity on player overlap after the heal event fires.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_torch_pickup_4f_8fps.png through AssetServer and build a four-frame atlas for pickup instances.
runtime_notes: Pickup restores one HP up to the cap of three.
The flame loop continues even if the pickup is attached to a moving platform section.
Warm color accent stays isolated to the flame so the HUD torch motif can echo it cleanly.

context.usage: Small hanging torch pickup that restores one HP and offers a warm visual counterpoint inside the cold shaft.

shape.silhouette: Tiny wall torch with a dark handle, bright flame core, and one flickering outer ember.

specs.lighting: Warm ember flicker against a dark handle.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x16 px with four 8x16 frames.
The flame core remains visible in all frames and never drops below 4 px in height.
Handle silhouette stays anchored to the lower center of each frame.
